decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to base_record_id route_webster-ave-sbs, which is an existing registry record for the Bx41 SBS route on Webster Avenue. The source evidence (p018_c0002) confirms 'Bx41 LTD → Bx41 SBS' with 1/2 mile stop spacing. No different registry record matches better than the existing base_record_id. Per canonicalization rules, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new'.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bx41 LTD → Bx41 SBS - ½ mile stop spacing - Service will run frequently all day
